name: unicode_nfkd16_compat_decomp_literal
description: NFKD 15→16 delta + combining-mark removal: U+105C9 has no decomposition under Go/Unicode-15 but decomposes to U+105D2 + U+0307 under unicode-normalization/Unicode-16; removeAccents strips the combining U+0307, so input U+105C9 accent-folds to U+105D2 and matches literal U+105D2. #555 Slice 2 — native now CLAIMS this non-ASCII match_string case (match_string folds through internal/debaml/bamlunicode, byte-for-byte Rust 1.93.0 str::to_lowercase / unicode-normalization 0.1.24, so the verdict is native's to claim, never case-fold-uncertain). want is BAML v0.223's byte-exact final parse, held by this differential; native==BAML is independently proven by the exhaustive bamlunicode Rust reference.
